prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 15 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class III)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Diabetic Foot Ulcer / High-Risk Foot
Urolithiasis (status post lithotripsy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 79.9 kg; Height 157.3 cm; BMI 32.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 139/77 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.2%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 8.2%; current 8.6%), FPG (12 months ago 195mg/dL; 9 months ago 170mg/dL; 6 months ago 178mg/dL; 3 months ago 195mg/dL; current 201mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 81.8kg; 9 months ago 81.9kg; 6 months ago 81.9kg; 3 months ago 81.2kg; current 79.9kg), Height (12 months ago 157.3cm; 9 months ago 157.3cm; 6 months ago 157.3cm; 3 months ago 157.3cm; current 157.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 32.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 142mmHg; 9 months ago 136mmHg; 6 months ago 140mmHg; 3 months ago 136mmHg; current 139mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 75mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 77mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 83U/L; 9 months ago 80U/L; 6 months ago 70U/L; 3 months ago 69U/L; current 80U/L), AST (12 months ago 94U/L; 9 months ago 82U/L; 6 months ago 87U/L; 3 months ago 77U/L; current 90U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; current 39mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 182mg/g; 9 months ago 252mg/g; 6 months ago 202mg/g; 3 months ago 209mg/g; current 272mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 96mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 97mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 55mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 140mg/dL; 9 months ago 126mg/dL; 6 months ago 143mg/dL; 3 months ago 143mg/dL; current 134mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 11.1g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
